positive: A whimsical forest scene featuring anthropomorphic woodland creatures (foxes, badgers, and owls) having a picnic under giant glowing mushrooms. Storybook illustration style, soft pastel palette, golden hour lighting, highly detailed digital art, Studio Ghibli influence.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, harsh shadows, realistic photo
